title: Suited Allays
description: This pack adds clothes to your allays, giving them some personality! Has Fresh Animations support!
body:
# Suited Allays

This resource pack personalizes your helpful allay companions by making them wear clothes! The allays match my [Minecraft skins](https://namemc.com/profile/thricebite.1) which were inspired by:
- [Skin Pack 2](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Skin_Pack_2)
- [Skin Pack 3](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Skin_Pack_3)
- [Town Folk](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Town_Folk_Skin_Pack)
- [City Folk](https://minecraft.wiki/w/City_Folk_Skin_Pack)
- [Holiday Skin Pack 2015](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Holiday_Skin_Pack_2015)

**Suited Allays uses and requires Optifine custom and random textures to function.** 
Here are some mods to enable Optifine custom and random texture features: 
- Entity Texture Features: https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures
- Optifine: https://www.optifine.net/home

**Please place the Suited Allays resource pack above the Fresh Animations resource pack in the resource pack settings.** As stated in the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Resource_pack#Behavior): "Resource packs load their assets based on the order they appear in on the "Selected" list. The bottom-most pack loads first, then each pack above it replaces or merges loaded assets with ones it contains."

Please check out the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/suitedallays/gallery
) to see what to rename your allays to, to get the corresponding skin.

Thanks to Mojang/Microsoft for the allay asset and [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) for [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)!
